gameStart.intro:
Perfect. Allow me to set the scene for you...

You and two other adventurers have been tasked with escorting a carriage containing two crates of a precious cargo,
the likes of which cannot afford to be damaged. You're about three days into your journey, with a couple more to go.
As you begin to settle down for the night, you hear a slight rustling in a nearly bush. You stand betweenthe camp and the bush,
watching it warily, as an angry looking goblin jumps out at you, brandishing a rusty knife.

elder.quest: Please defeat the goblins in the forest.
